title: M2CModuleManifest
description: Manifest that every M2C module MUST declare. Defines identity, capability, cost, and dependency information (spec/v0.2/modules.md §2.1).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference URI for this manifest

id.description: Module identifier. Core modules use simple names (e.g. 'scene'). Third-party modules SHOULD use reverse-domain naming (e.g. 'com.example.brand-detection').

category.description: Module category. 'atom' = single-function minimal dependency. 'workflow' = composes multiple atoms.

description.description: Short description of the module's function

supportedTypes.description: Media types this module can process (e.g. 'video', 'audio', 'image'). See protocol.md §2 for the full type list.

dependencies.description: Module IDs that must run before this module. Use '"*"' as the sole element to mean 'all executed modules' (used by the 'summary' module).

confidenceWeight.description: Weight for confidence aggregation. See modules.md §3.1 for default values per core module.

outputArtifacts.description: Whether this module produces file artifacts (e.g. keyframe images)

streaming.description: Whether this module supports streaming input

estimateCost.description: Cost estimation hints keyed by precision level or scope

homepage.description: URL to the module's home page or repository
